exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S14-T4-A-E1
import numpy as np
a = np.arange(1000, dtype=float)
b = a.copy()
s1 = 0.0
for i in range(len(a)):
    s1 += a[i] * b[i]
s2 = float((a * b).sum())
print(abs(s1 - s2) < 1e-6)

exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S14-T4-A-E3
import numpy as np, time
valor = 10000
a = np.zeros(valor)
b = np.ones(valor)
t0 = time.perf_counter()
c = a + b
_ = time.perf_counter() - t0
print("timed", float(c.mean()) == 1.0)
